# Fluent

> Fluent sells specialist business courses for small business owners, packaged twice: as installable AI Course Skills that drop into Claude, ChatGPT or Gemini and run as a specialist coach on your actual business, and as a designed ebook for the moments you want to read rather than prompt. Same methodology, two ways in. Individual Course Skills are £14.99 each while we launch; multi-skill bundles save more.

A Course Skill is the product format: a SKILL.md persona file, four or five reference documents, four or five working worksheets, a HOW-TO-INSTALL guide for each platform, and the full course as a designed ebook PDF. Around 70 pages of engineered material per skill. Delivery is instant: pay via Stripe, download on the next page, no account needed. Works with Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://fluent.md/): What Fluent is, the full catalogue, the bundles, how it works, and the FAQ.
- [How it works](https://fluent.md/#how): Buy, download in sixty seconds, install in your AI of choice.
- [FAQ](https://fluent.md/#faq): The questions people actually ask, answered plainly.

## The Course Skills (£14.99 each)

- [How To Price Your Offers](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Find the right price, articulate your value, and handle pricing objections.
- [How To Sound Human Using AI](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Use AI to produce content that doesn't read like everyone else's AI.
- [How To Add AI Audio To Your Content](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Add natural AI narration to videos, slides and training without a studio.
- [How To Win Your Local Market](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Get found locally, build word of mouth, and convert nearby customers.
- [How To Turn One-Time Buyers Into Loyal Customers](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): A 30-day plan to turn buyers into repeat customers and advocates.
- [How To Build Know, Like, Trust In 30 Days](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Daily actions to become someone your audience knows, warms to, and trusts.
- [How To Create Content That Pulls People In](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): Magnetic content that pulls people in rather than chasing them.
- [How To Manage Your Time Effectively](https://fluent.md/#catalogue): The 3 P's system (Prioritise, Plan, Produce) to cut the list, plan the week, and get the work that matters done.

## Bundles (buy together, save more)

- [The Audience Trio](https://fluent.md/#catalogue) — £29: Build Know, Like, Trust + Create Content That Pulls People In + Sound Human Using AI. Three skills for the price of two.
- [The Get-Paid Trio](https://fluent.md/#catalogue) — £29: Price Your Offers + Turn One-Time Buyers Into Loyal Customers + Win Your Local Market.
- [The Content Engine Trio](https://fluent.md/#catalogue) — £29: Create Content That Pulls People In + Sound Human Using AI + Add AI Audio To Your Content.
- [The Full Launch Library](https://fluent.md/#catalogue) — £99: All eight Course Skills available at launch, the lowest price per skill.

## Legal

- [Refunds](https://fluent.md/refunds.html): 14-day, no-questions refund policy.
- [Privacy](https://fluent.md/privacy.html): Minimal data, nothing sold, essential cookies only.
- [Terms](https://fluent.md/terms.html): The agreement between you and Fluent, in plain English.
